description: Hill-climbing optimized context templates and facets for Firestore supplies dataset iteration 4

templates.nl_query: What's the average number of items per sale for in-store purchases where customer satisfaction was above 4 in 2016?
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2016-01-01'), $lt: ISODate('2017-01-01') }, purchaseMethod: 'In store', 'customer.satisfaction': { $gt: 4 } } }, { $project: { totalItems: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $group: { _id: null, averageItemsPerSale: { $avg: '$totalItems' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, averageItemsPerSale: 1 } }])
templates.intent: average number of items per sale calculates totalItems as sum of items.quantity per transaction document then averages totalItems
templates.manifest: average number of items per sale formula

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$1'), $lt: ISODate('$2') }, purchaseMethod: '$3', 'customer.satisfaction': { $gt: $4 } } }, { $project: { totalItems: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $group: { _id: null, averageItemsPerSale: { $avg: '$totalItems' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, averageItemsPerSale: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: average number of items per sale between $1 and $2 for purchaseMethod $3 with satisfaction above $4

templates.nl_query: What is the total sales volume for transactions with coupons used in December 2017?
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { couponUsed: true, saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-12-01T00:00:00Z'), $lt: ISODate('2018-01-01T00:00:00Z') } } }, { $unwind: "$items" }, { $group: { _id: null, totalSalesVolume: { $sum: { $multiply: ["$items.price", "$items.quantity"] } } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, totalSalesVolume: 1 } }])
templates.intent: total sales volume for transactions with coupons used calculates totalSalesVolume as sum of items.price multiplied by items.quantity after unwinding items
templates.manifest: total sales volume for transactions with coupons used formula

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { couponUsed: true, saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$1'), $lt: ISODate('$2') } } }, { $unwind: "$items" }, { $group: { _id: null, totalSalesVolume: { $sum: { $multiply: ["$items.price", "$items.quantity"] } } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, totalSalesVolume: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: total sales volume for coupon transactions between $1 and $2

templates.nl_query: What's the total sales revenue generated from 'office supplies' at the Denver store?
templates.intent: office supplies tag is 'office' (literal string office without supplies)

parameterized.parameterized_intent: total revenue for tag $2 at store $1

templates.nl_query: Show me the total sales volume for each month in Q4 2017.
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-10-01'), $lt: ISODate('2018-01-01') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: { month: { $month: '$saleDate' } }, totalSalesVolume: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, month: '$_id.month', totalSalesVolume: 1 } }])
templates.intent: total sales volume for each month in Q4 2017 measures total quantity sold by summing items.quantity
templates.manifest: total sales volume by month measures items.quantity sum

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$1'), $lt: ISODate('$2') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: { month: { $month: '$saleDate' } }, totalSalesVolume: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, month: '$_id.month', totalSalesVolume: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: total sales volume by month between $1 and $2

templates.nl_query: What is the average sales volume per transaction for sales where coupons were used in December 2017?
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { couponUsed: true, saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-12-01T00:00:00Z'), $lt: ISODate('2018-01-01T00:00:00Z') } } }, { $project: { totalSalesVolume: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $group: { _id: null, averageSalesVolume: { $avg: '$totalSalesVolume' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, averageSalesVolume: 1 } }])
templates.intent: average sales volume per transaction calculates totalSalesVolume as sum of items.quantity per document then averages totalSalesVolume
templates.manifest: average sales volume per transaction formula

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { couponUsed: true, saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$1'), $lt: ISODate('$2') } } }, { $project: { totalSalesVolume: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $group: { _id: null, averageSalesVolume: { $avg: '$totalSalesVolume' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, averageSalesVolume: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: average sales volume per transaction between $1 and $2

templates.nl_query: What are the total sales for each purchase method like 'In store' and 'Online'?
templates.intent: Total sales revenue per purchase method requires unwinding items and calculating price multiplied by quantity
templates.manifest: Total sales revenue per purchase method

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Total sales revenue per purchase method

templates.nl_query: What are the total sales and average customer satisfaction for 'In store' purchases at the Denver location?
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { purchaseMethod: 'In store', storeLocation: 'Denver' } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: null, totalSales: { $sum: { $multiply: ['$items.price', '$items.quantity'] } }, averageSatisfaction: { $avg: '$customer.satisfaction' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, totalSales: 1, averageSatisfaction: 1 } }])
templates.intent: Total sales revenue and average satisfaction for In store purchases at Denver location
templates.manifest: Total sales revenue and average satisfaction for In store purchases

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { purchaseMethod: '$1', storeLocation: '$2' } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: null, totalSales: { $sum: { $multiply: ['$items.price', '$items.quantity'] } }, averageSatisfaction: { $avg: '$customer.satisfaction' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, totalSales: 1, averageSatisfaction: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Total sales revenue and average satisfaction for purchaseMethod $1 at storeLocation $2

templates.nl_query: Which top 3 store locations have the highest average satisfaction ratings for purchases that included school supplies?
templates.intent: School supplies refers to items.tags equal to 'school'
templates.manifest: Filter by items.tags equal to school for school supplies

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Filter by items.tags $1

templates.nl_query: What purchase methods were used in Austin in December 2017?
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { storeLocation: 'Austin', saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-12-01'), $lt: ISODate('2018-01-01') } } }, { $group: { _id: '$purchaseMethod', count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, purchaseMethod: '$_id', count: 1 } }])
templates.intent: List purchase methods used and count how many times each method was used
templates.manifest: List purchase methods used and transaction counts

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { storeLocation: '$1', saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$2'), $lt: ISODate('$3') } } }, { $group: { _id: '$purchaseMethod', count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, purchaseMethod: '$_id', count: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Purchase methods used at storeLocation $1 between dates $2 and $3

templates.nl_query: What was the average customer satisfaction score across all store locations for December 2017?
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-12-01T00:00:00Z'), $lt: ISODate('2018-01-01T00:00:00Z') } } }, { $group: { _id: null, averageSatisfaction: { $avg: '$customer.satisfaction' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, averageSatisfaction: 1 } }])
templates.intent: Average satisfaction across all store locations requires _id: null in $group stage
templates.manifest: Average satisfaction across all store locations combined

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$1'), $lt: ISODate('$2') } } }, { $group: { _id: null, averageSatisfaction: { $avg: '$customer.satisfaction' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, averageSatisfaction: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Average satisfaction across all store locations between $1 and $2

templates.nl_query: How many items were sold with coupons at the Denver store over the last quarter of 2017?
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { couponUsed: true, storeLocation: 'Denver', saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-10-01'), $lte: ISODate('2017-12-31') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: null, totalItemsSold: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, totalItemsSold: 1 } }])
templates.intent: Total items sold requires unwinding items array and summing items.quantity
templates.manifest: Total items sold by summing items.quantity

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { couponUsed: true, storeLocation: '$1', saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$2'), $lte: ISODate('$3') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: null, totalItemsSold: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, totalItemsSold: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Total items sold for storeLocation $1 between dates $2 and $3

templates.nl_query: Which product categories had the highest sales in October 2017?
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-10-01T00:00:00.000Z'), $lt: ISODate('2017-11-01T00:00:00.000Z') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $unwind: '$items.tags' }, { $group: { _id: '$items.tags', totalQuantity: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $sort: { totalQuantity: -1 } }, { $project: { category: '$_id', totalQuantity: 1, _id: 0 } }])
templates.intent: Highest sales by product category refers to highest totalQuantity sold
templates.manifest: Highest sales by category measures totalQuantity sold

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$1'), $lt: ISODate('$2') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $unwind: '$items.tags' }, { $group: { _id: '$items.tags', totalQuantity: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $sort: { totalQuantity: -1 } }, { $project: { category: '$_id', totalQuantity: 1, _id: 0 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Highest sales category by totalQuantity between $1 and $2

templates.nl_query: I need a list of all items sold by store location in the last month of 2017.
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-12-01T00:00:00Z'), $lte: ISODate('2017-12-31T23:59:59Z') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: '$storeLocation', items: { $push: { name: '$items.name', quantity: '$items.quantity' } } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, storeLocation: '$_id', items: 1 } }])
templates.intent: List of all items sold by store location uses $push with name and quantity
templates.manifest: List all items sold by store location with push array

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$1'), $lte: ISODate('$2') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: '$storeLocation', items: { $push: { name: '$items.name', quantity: '$items.quantity' } } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, storeLocation: '$_id', items: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: List all items sold by store location between $1 and $2

templates.nl_query: Provide a list of 8 top-selling items from Winter 2017.
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2016-12-01'), $lt: ISODate('2017-03-01') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: '$items.name', totalQuantity: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $sort: { totalQuantity: -1 } }, { $limit: 8 }, { $project: { _id: 0, name: '$_id', quantity: '$totalQuantity' } }])
templates.intent: Winter 2017 date range is December 2016 through February 2017 (2016-12-01 to 2017-03-01)

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2016-12-01'), $lt: ISODate('2017-03-01') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: '$items.name', totalQuantity: { $sum: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $sort: { totalQuantity: -1 } }, { $limit: $1 }, { $project: { _id: 0, name: '$_id', quantity: '$totalQuantity' } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Top $1 items from Winter 2017

templates.nl_query: I need a comparison of in-store and online sales for December 2017.
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-12-01T00:00:00Z'), $lte: ISODate('2017-12-31T23:59:59Z') } } }, { $group: { _id: '$purchaseMethod', count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, purchaseMethod: '$_id', count: 1 } }])
templates.intent: Comparison of in-store and online sales means transaction count per purchaseMethod
templates.manifest: Comparison of sales by purchaseMethod transaction count

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$1'), $lte: ISODate('$2') } } }, { $group: { _id: '$purchaseMethod', count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, purchaseMethod: '$_id', count: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Comparison of sales by purchaseMethod between $1 and $2

templates.nl_query: Give me the emails and satisfaction ratings of customers who bought items priced above $150, at least twice in December 2017.
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-12-01'), $lt: ISODate('2018-01-01') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $match: { 'items.price': { $gt: 150 } } }, { $group: { _id: { email: '$customer.email', satisfaction: '$customer.satisfaction' }, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gte: 2 } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, email: '$_id.email', satisfaction: '$_id.satisfaction' } }])
templates.intent: Buying items priced above threshold at least twice means grouping by customer and matching transaction count count >= 2
templates.manifest: Customers buying items above price threshold at least twice

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('$1'), $lt: ISODate('$2') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $match: { 'items.price': { $gt: $3 } } }, { $group: { _id: { email: '$customer.email', satisfaction: '$customer.satisfaction' }, count: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $match: { count: { $gte: $4 } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, email: '$_id.email', satisfaction: '$_id.satisfaction' } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Customers buying items above price $3 at least $4 times between $1 and $2

templates.nl_query: Can you give me the average price and quantity sold for stationary items in the New York store?
templates.sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { storeLocation: 'New York' } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $match: { 'items.tags': 'stationary' } }, { $group: { _id: null, averagePrice: { $avg: '$items.price' }, averageQuantity: { $avg: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, averagePrice: 1, averageQuantity: 1 } }])
templates.intent: Stationary items tag is literal string 'stationary'

parameterized.parameterized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { storeLocation: '$1' } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $match: { 'items.tags': '$2' } }, { $group: { _id: null, averagePrice: { $avg: '$items.price' }, averageQuantity: { $avg: '$items.quantity' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, averagePrice: 1, averageQuantity: 1 } }])
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Average price and quantity for tag $2 at store $1
